zh.Great Waltham, Essex, England: 英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦
zh.lifeSummary: 當Joan Mulaine於1440年出生在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦時，她的父親John Mulaine20歲，母親Margaret Cowly15歲。她於大約1458年與William Drake在英國艾可格亞特 沃爾坦結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和3個女兒的父母。她去世於1481年8月28日在英國英格蘭艾可格亞特 沃爾坦享年41歲。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Joan Mulaine于1440年出生在英国艾可格亞特 沃爾坦时，她的父亲John Mulaine20岁，母亲Margaret Cowly15岁。她于大约1458年与William Drake在英国艾可格亞特 沃爾坦结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和3个女儿的父母。她去世于1481年8月28日在英国英格兰艾可格亞特 沃爾坦享年41岁。

nameMeanings.name: Mulaine
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.

variants.name: McLean
meanings: Scottish: Anglicized form of Gaelic Mac Gille Eáin, ‘son of the servant (i.e. devotee) of (Saint) John’. Compare Irish McAloon and McGlone .

History: This is the name of a major Scottish clan traditionally associated with the island of Mull, which claims descent from Gille Eáin na Tuaidh (‘Gillean of the Battleaxe’), who lived in the 13th century.

nameMeanings.name: Joan
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Contracted form of Old French Jo(h)anne, from Latin Io(h)anna ( see Joanna ). In England this was the usual feminine form of John from the Middle English period onwards and was extremely popular, but in the 16th and 17th centuries it steadily lost ground to Jane . It was strongly revived in the first part of the 20th century, partly under the influence of George Bernard Shaw's play St Joan ( 1923 ), based on the life of Joan of Arc ( 1412–31 ). Claiming to be guided by the voices of the saints, she persuaded the French dauphin to defy the occupying English forces and have himself crowned, and she led the French army that raised the siege of Orleans in 1429 . The following year she was captured by the Burgundians and sold to the English, and a year later she was burned at the stake for witchcraft at the age of 18 or 19. Her story has captured the imagination of many writers, and she is variously portrayed as a national and political hero, a model of apolitical straightforwardness and honesty, and a religious heroine. She was canonized in 1920 . More recent influences have included the American film actress Joan Crawford ( 1908–77 , born Lucille le Sueur ), the British actress Joan Collins ( b. 1933 ), the American comedienne Joan Rivers ( b. 1933 ), and the West Indian pop singer Joan Armatrading ( b. 1950 ).

variants.name: John
meanings: As a boy's name this represents a revival of Middle English Jan, a by‐form of John , or an adoption of the common European form with this spelling. As a girl's name it is a short form of names such as Janet and Janice .

historicEvents.title: Wars of the Roses
historicEvents.description: Wars of the Roses was a series of English civil wars for control of the throne of England between the royal families House of Lancaster and the House of York. The name of the war was derived as the red rose was the symbol of the Lancastrians and the white rose was the symbol of the Yorks.

en.lifeSummary: When Joan Mulaine was born in 1440, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, her father, John Mulaine, was 20 and her mother, Margaret Cowly, was 15. She married William Drake about 1458, in Great Waltham, Essex, England. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 3 daughters. She died on 28 August 1481, in Great Waltham, Essex, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 41.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Joan Mulaine est née en 1440, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, son père, John Mulaine, avait 20 ans et sa mère, Margaret Cowly, avait 15 ans. Elle a épousé William Drake environ 1458, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 3 filles. Elle est décédée le 28 août 1481, à Great Waltham, Essex, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 41 ans.

ja.lifeSummary: Joan Mulaineが1440年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムで生まれた時，父John Mulaineは20歳，母Margaret Cowlyは15歳であった。約1458年にイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムでWilliam Drakeと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と3人の娘の親であった。彼女は1481年8月28日にイギリスイギリスエセックスグレアト ワルサムで41歳で死去した。

ko.lifeSummary: Joan Mulaine(이)가 1440년 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 John Mulaine(은)는 20세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Margaret Cowly(은)는 15세였다. 그녀는 대략 1458년 영국 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 William Drake(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 세 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1481년 8월 28일 영국 잉글랜드 에세스 그리트 월섬에서 41세의 나이로 사망했다.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Joan Mulaine родилась в 1440 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, её отцу по имени John Mulaine было 20 лет, а матери, которую звали Margaret Cowly, 15. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени William Drake около 1458 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 3 дочери. Она умерла 28 августа 1481 г. в местности грит валтам, эссекс, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 41 год.
